personas.name: Jordan Rivera
personas.role: Owns operational risk for production agents; runs governance remediation from Slack

personas.name: Mission Control Agent
personas.role: Surfaces governance signals, explains policy context, guides remediation, and posts fleet status

content.text:
*Order Processing Agent · USW-7*
Policy *POL-AGT-DOMAIN-REM-03* (Agent domain restriction) blocked *4 attempted actions* in the last *8 minutes*. The agent is operating outside its allowed domain.

*Blast radius — this hour*
• *280* Retail · logged-in users
• *95* Guest checkout users
• *45* Loyalty members
Total exposure *~420 users/hr*, all on USW-7.

*If left running*
The cluster-wide circuit breaker trips in roughly *12 min* at current rate. Audit trail is being captured against your Slack actor.

*Two paths forward*
• *Stop traffic* — immediate containment. Routes requests to the fallback responder. Reversible.
• *Override policy* — accept the risk, keep the agent live. Logged on the record.

content.statusText: Stopping USW-7 traffic and rerouting to fallback…

content.text:
I've handled the containment step.

*Traffic status*
• Order Processing Agent: *0%* production traffic
• *Fallback cluster:* active for impacted workflows
• *Risk posture:* materially reduced while we retrain

Next, I'll capture the worst offenders as eval cases and kick off retrain with production feedback.

Choose an action below to continue.

content.statusText: Saving flagged sessions as eval cases and starting retrain…

content.text:
Jordan—progress update from the remediation pipeline.

*Capture*
• Saved *3* flagged production sessions as *gold eval cases*
• Linked each case to the policy slice that drifted (off-topic routing)

*Retrain*
• Training window: last *72h* of production feedback + your updated suite
• Objective: restore *in-assignment* behavior without overfitting to noise

content.statusText: Finishing retrain run and running the quality gate…

content.text:
Retrain complete. The eval gate is green—this build is ready to promote.

*Quality gate*
• Eval pass rate: *98.4%* (up from *91.2%*)
• Policy violations on the held-out test slice: *0*
• Regression suite: *green* (checkout + order-status intents)

*What deploy will do*
• Target: *Order Processing Agent* — *US production*
• Canary: *off* — traffic is already contained, this is a controlled bring-up
• Rollback: one-click revert to last known-good in Mission Control

Click below to start the deploy pipeline.

*Deploying…*

• Pipeline: *US prod promotion*
• Health probes: warming
• Audit: revision metadata captured in Mission Control

*Live on US production*

• Revision: *`rev-us-prod-8f2c91a`*
• Region: *US*
• Agent: *Order Processing Agent*

I've restored confidence signals to green for the promotion path you just approved.

Closure check—I've handled the tail of the incident loop.

*Production posture*
• Traffic to the retrained agent: *100%* restored on the primary path
• Fallback: *standby* (not receiving customer load)
• Monitoring: *active* for new policy violations and drift warnings

Nice work staying decisive—this DM thread stays your quick-reference audit trail.

*App Home — Fleet digest*

*Fleet overview*
• *Open incidents:* *0* (critical)
• *Agents in violation:* *0*
• *Clusters reporting yellow:* *0*

*Regional posture*
• *USW-7:* healthy — Order Processing Agent on *`rev-us-prod-8f2c91a`*
• *Fallback pool:* idle, ready if needed

*Rhythm of Business*
• Next payroll-adjacent agent audit window: *48h* (FYI—no action needed right now)

If anything spikes again, I'll speak up early—same playbook, right here.
